overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking along a winding dirt trail through a lush summer forest. The journey progresses from open meadow into shaded rocky woodland and back to sunlit paths, featuring vibrant greens and wildflowers.

scene_state.functional_zone: open meadow trail with scattered ancient trees

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the dirt path through grassy meadow with wildflowers

entered.detail: large solitary oak tree with spreading branches ahead on the path
winding dirt path with visible wheel ruts and patches of grass
lush green grass fields with scattered red poppies and wildflowers

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with Geralt walking along a sunlit dirt trail through an open meadow. An ancient oak tree stands prominently ahead while lush grass and red wildflowers line both sides of the path. The environment is bright and open with clear blue skies visible above.

scene_state.functional_zone: shaded forest trail with large rock outcroppings

events.description: camera passes through dense tree leaves temporarily obscuring the view
character follows the curving path turning slightly to the left

agents.ego_description: Geralt continues walking through denser forest section, navigating around large rock formations on the left

entered.detail: massive gray boulders and rock outcroppings alongside the trail
thick overhead tree cover creating dappled shade on the path

segments.scene_description: The trail enters a denser forest section with large rock formations visible on the left. The canopy becomes thicker, creating shaded areas with dappled sunlight. Around the 40-second mark, the camera briefly passes through foliage causing an occlusion, and the path curves left as Geralt continues forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: sunlit forest trail with wildflower clearings

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking along the winding trail through sunlit forest with purple wildflowers visible on the right

entered.detail: opening in the forest with bright sunlight streaming through the trees
clusters of purple flowers lining the right side of the dirt path

segments.scene_description: The final segment continues through a sunlit forest trail that has opened up slightly from the dense rocky section. Purple wildflowers line the right side of the path while the trail winds forward through mixed forest. The lighting returns to bright natural sunlight with clear visibility of the path ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a bright, open meadow into the shaded depths of a dense forest. It begins with Geralt walking along a sunlit dirt trail lined with lush grass and red wildflowers, moving toward a prominent ancient oak tree under clear blue skies. As the path progresses, the environment shifts into a thicker woodland where the canopy closes in, creating areas of dappled sunlight and shadow. The scene then tightens as the camera passes through obscuring foliage and skirts large rock formations on the left before the trail curves leftward into the deepening woods.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a forest trail as it transitions from a confined rocky area into a bright, open woodland. It begins by emerging from the dense rocky section, where the path gradually widens and the canopy thins. As the camera moves forward, the lighting shifts back to bright natural sunlight, enhancing the visibility of the winding dirt trail ahead. The scene then expands to reveal vibrant purple wildflowers lining the right side of the path, guiding the way through a lush mixed forest.
